description: Sector overlay for airlines, aviation operators, airports, ground handlers, maintenance organizations, training organizations, and aviation service providers in the UK.

metadata.scope: UK sector overlay controls for Aviation. Intended to be used with uk_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official UK legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.
metadata.territorial_scope_note: UK law can differ across England, Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland. This starter pack uses UK-wide sources where available and flags devolved or nation-specific application for human review.

primary_sources.name: Preparing and applying for an Air Operator Certificate
Civil Aviation Authority passenger and consumer materials

rules.title: CAA Air Operator Certificate or operating-licence evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for CAA AOC, operating licence, police AOC, restricted AOC, or commercial air transport authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Air operations safety-management evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety management, accountable manager, operations manual, risk assessment, or CAA compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Continuing airworthiness or maintenance governance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for CAMO, continuing airworthiness, maintenance programme, Part-145, or aircraft technical-record evidence.

metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Passenger, ticketing, or consumer-disclosure evidence is present where consumer-facing
rules.summary: Checks for passenger rights, complaints, cancellation, delay, refund, accessibility, or ATOL evidence.

rules.title: No evidence of unlicensed commercial air transport is present
rules.summary: Screens for phrases suggesting commercial aviation operations without required CAA authority.

prohibited_signals: no operating licence required for commercial flights
